ddls:
CREATE TABLE "outcome_measures" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome measure */,
  "outcome_measure" TEXT /* Name of the outcome measure */,
  "assessment_tool" TEXT /* Assessment tool used for the outcome measure */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the outcome measure */,
  "comparison_type" TEXT /* Comparison type (e.g., Multitiered dual-language instruction vs. Business as usual) */,
  "period" TEXT /* Time period of the study (e.g., 0 Days) */,
  "sample_population" TEXT /* Sample population (e.g., Full sample; 80 students) */,
  "intervention_mean" REAL /* Mean outcome of the intervention */,
  "comparison_mean" REAL /* Mean outcome of the comparison */,
  "significant" INTEGER /* Whether the difference between intervention and comparison is statistically significant */,
  "improvement_index" REAL /* Index of improvement (e.g., 30) */,
  "evidence_tier" TEXT /* Tier of evidence (e.g., None) */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier of the study */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcome_measures_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the study */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the study was published */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the study */,
  "study_type" TEXT /* Type of the study (e.g., randomized controlled trial, observational study) */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the study */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier of the study the researcher is associated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researchers_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier of the study */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outcome_measure_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "outcome_measure_type" TEXT /* Name of the outcome measure type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome measure type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outcome_measure_type_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "outcome_measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier of the outcome measure */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier of the outcome measure type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcome_measure_type_links_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES outcome_measure_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcome_measure_type_links_outcome_measure_id FOREIGN KEY ("outcome_measure_id") REFERENCES outcome_measures ("measure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier of the researcher */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier of the study */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier of the study */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the collaboration (e.g., lead researcher, co-researcher) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_collaborations_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_collaborations_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)
